rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF ROWENA VELONZA
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #9, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) The conservator requests that the bond be exonerated or reduced to $9,700. 2) The conservator's attorney requests $4,770 for legal services and $742.21 for costs including the filing fee, even though the Court has waived fees in this case. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RAYMUNDO LUNA TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Authority To Refinance Trust Real Property And To Execute Loan Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The petition requests the trustee's authority to refinance the Market Street property and borrow up to $700,000 in satisfaction of the existing liens and for repayment of $274,000 to the trustee and beneficiary's family. The trustee's 4th account, which has not been settled, shows $52,026.50 as liabilities of the trust for the trustee's fees ($3,000) and loans from the trustee and beneficiary ($49,026.50). PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FREDERICK J. MUNZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their first and last name and case number. ISSUES (may be addressed at hearing): 1) Probate Code 13650 says, "a surviving spouse or the personal representative, guardian of the estate, or conservator of the estate of the surviving spouse may file a petition..." Counsel should be prepared to cite legal authority that allows an attorney-in-fact to petition under Probate Code 13650.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE WILLIAM H. GREEN REVOCABLE TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Determining Title To Real Property
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/16/2021. Examiner received the required courtesy copy late on 10/15/2021. [See LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Matter continued to allow Examiner time to review. Examiner has not received a proposed order. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date, with the scheduled hearing date noted on the face sheet. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 11/1/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
